title: Russ Ducksley — electronics and mechanism repair
description: Russ Ducksley Singin' in the Rain animatronic duck — motor, gearbox, and wiring fault. We rebuilt the drive mechanism and electronics so he sways, taps his foot, and sings again.
itemDetails: Russ (Russ Berrie / Russ Gift) Ducksley — The Singing Duck "Singin' in the Rain" (circa 2003). Yellow plush duck with yellow rain hat and checkered bow tie; animatronic: sways side to side and taps foot while singing "Singin' in the Rain." Internal plastic chassis with DC motor, gear train, speaker behind grille, and battery-powered sound board. Common failure modes on aged units: stripped or jammed gears, loose belt, fractured harness, corroded battery contacts. Market: nostalgic gift-shop / secondary-market animatronic plush; not current production. Sources: Animatronic Wiki (Russ Ducksley); collector listings for Russ singing duck line.
